feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from lillytino_

entry.title: We love a supportive parent 👏
entry.content: We love a supportive parent 👏

entry.title: Companies that use gender neutral language in their products and marketing: @Microsoft, @apple, @Google, @IBM, @Salesforce, @Meta Quest, @Netflix, @Starbucks, @Nike, @Adobe, @Spotify, @Zoom and the list goes on!
entry.content: Companies that use gender neutral language in their products and marketing: @Microsoft, @apple, @Google, @IBM, @Salesforce, @Meta Quest, @Netflix, @Starbucks, @Nike, @Adobe, @Spotify, @Zoom and the list goes on!

entry.title: You got this Deandra ❤️

entry.content: If all goes to plan, I’ll get bottom surgery mid next year 🙏

entry.title: Do you know them all? 🤔

entry.content: The twist at the end though…

entry.title: Trans people aren’t here to make you comfortable. If us using the bathroom bothers you, that’s your problem 😊
entry.content: Trans people aren’t here to make you comfortable. If us using the bathroom bothers you, that’s your problem 😊

entry.title: We won’t back down ☺️
entry.content: We won’t back down ☺️

entry.title: Josh Seiter is the real rage bait. Check out the full clip 🔗

entry.title: Watch out 😉
entry.content: Watch out 😉

entry.title: Did you get them all right? 🤔
entry.content: Did you get them all right? 🤔

entry.title: They didn’t tell me this when i started transitioning 😩
entry.content: They didn’t tell me this when i started transitioning 😩

entry.title: Please use gender neutral language if you’re not sure. For the record, i did not make a stink or call the manager for any of these. Just stood up and left.
entry.content: Please use gender neutral language if you’re not sure. For the record, i did not make a stink or call the manager for any of these. Just stood up and left.
